div.head: 160. Editorial Note
div.p: The Subcommittee on Foreign Trade Policy of the House Ways and Means Committee held hearings on private foreign investment December 1–5. Under Secretary of State Dillon, International Cooperation Administration Director Smith, and Development Loan Fund Managing Director Mcintosh testified before the Subcommittee December 1. For texts of their statements, see Department of State Bulletin, December 29, 1958, pages 1056–1066.
